content.en:
When the Great Ancestors present saw the treasures on these lists, they were all full of eagerness, eager to obtain all the treasures above.

Ye Tian also took a look, and almost all of the treasures on it were treasures or chances that were of great use to the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

For example, there is a treasure called the Infinite Glass Heart, which requires 1 million contribution points to be exchanged.

And the above also introduced the usefulness of the immeasurable glass heart, which can assist in the impact of the Heavenly Ancestor realm, and can probably increase the success rate by 20%.

But even if it only increases the success rate by 20%, it is still an unimaginable treasure for these fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, and it can't be exchanged at all.

This kind of treasure is placed on it, which is just to attract the great ancestors present.

Ye Tian looked carefully, looking for the treasure that was most valuable to him.

"Immeasurable Magical Skill - Immeasurable Feather Armor, 300 Contribution Points!"

"Immeasurable Magical Technique-Escape Technique, 500 contribution points!"

Ye Tian saw that there were a lot of immeasurable magic skills on it, and their value was around a few hundred contribution points.

"Can the Infinite Divine Power still be sold?"

Ye Tian was a little surprised, wasn't the Infinite Divine Power Technique bred in the Infinite Bone?

"There should be secrets in the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable life form realm that I don't know, it seems that I have to buy a inheritance, so that I won't take a detour!" Ye Tian said darkly.

And there is a heritage on this list, and the value is not very high.

For example, the Heavenly Ancestor Cultivation Inheritance does not contain any inheritance of immeasurable supernatural powers, but only contains experience, which requires about 500 contribution points, which can be said to be very cheap.

"Redeem!"

Ye Tian spent 500 contribution points to directly exchange this inheritance.

Immediately, he fused this heritage.

After the fusion, Ye Tian had to admit that this inheritance was very pitiful, there was not much substance, and the only use was to point out the way forward for him to practice, so that he no longer had doubts.

And he finally understood the situation of the Infinite Divine Skill, the fifth stage of the high-level Infinite Lifeform could indeed give birth to the Infinite Divine Power Technique in the Infinite Bone.

The birth of an immeasurable supernatural power technique is the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform.

However, if the immeasurable supernatural power is naturally bred, the immeasurable supernatural power that is born will be very weak.

Therefore, after the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms have completed more than nine full-body refinements, they can start to intervene in the Infinite Divine Power Technique, thus giving birth to a specific Infinite Divine Power Technique.

It's like the immeasurable magic of the Infinite Feather Armor, its defensive ability is very terrifying, it is definitely the top defensive immeasurable magic technique, once it is cast, no matter how many high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the fourth stage are difficult to break.

If it was to be left to chance, the immeasurable supernatural power that was bred might be several grades worse than the immeasurable feather armor.

In short, this kind of immeasurable supernatural power inheritance is the top immeasurable supernatural power technique that has been tested by countless fifth-stage high-level immeasurable life forms, and then the Heavenly Ancestors have researched and created the intervention method.

And the method of intervention can be practiced and inherited, so this is what it came out!

"You can exchange for a defensive immeasurable magic inheritance, an attack class, a speed class, and an amplification class, it should be about the same!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he selected a few immeasurable magic techniques and exchanged them directly.

Whether it is the immeasurable supernatural power technique, or the Heavenly Ancestor cultivation inheritance, it is not worth mentioning in this list.

Ye Tian quickly set his sights on another treasure, which was the treasure that could really make his strength skyrocket.

"A chance to practice in the glazed light sea!"

According to the above introduction, the Glazed Light Sea is a special area, which currently belongs to Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor and belongs to his territory.

Although Ye Tian didn't know the specific effect of the glazed light sea, its value was 3,000 contribution points, so it was worth Ye Tian's choice.

At this moment, Ye Tian still has more than 4,000 contribution points.

Then, he chose a weapon treasure called the Escape Shuttle, which could increase speed, and most importantly, allow him to shuttle into the Infinite Realm Ruins!

You must know that the fourth stage of high-level immeasurable lifeforms is normally unable to enter the Infinite Realm Ruins, and the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms can only enter the Infinite Realm Ruins if they master some means.

The last time he entered the Infinite Realm Ruins with the Blood Ancestor, it was also based on a crack and the means left by the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor, if it was him, he would definitely not be able to go.

But if there is a Retreat Shuttle, then he can go to or leave the Infinite Realm Ruins alone, and this treasure means a lot to him.

For example, he found treasure resources in the immeasurable realm ruins, and he could send them back through the Escape Shuttle.

In that case, even if the copy body is killed in the Immeasurable Ruins, the treasure will be in hand.

The Escape Shuttle requires 2300 contribution points to be exchanged, Ye Tian didn't think much about it, and directly exchanged it.

That's it, he still has 2000 contribution points in his hand!

"The remaining 2,000 contribution points will be exchanged for the blood of the Supreme God!"

Ye Tian didn't know much about the Taishang Divine Blood, if he looked at the introduction, this treasure could improve the realm of the immeasurable body, even if it was for the Mahayana immeasurable body, it had an unimaginable improvement effect.

Ye Tian was ready to use this Supreme Divine Blood to impact the Perfection Realm of Taihao's immeasurable body.

Once Taihao Immeasurable Body, the Mahayana Immeasurable Body, reaches the consummation realm, his strength will skyrocket, so it is naturally extremely cost-effective to spend 2000 contribution points in exchange for a skyrocketing strength.

"Redeem!"

A ball of Supreme Divine Blood directly appeared in Ye Tian's hand, which contained terrifying energy.

He didn't absorb it here, but put it away.

At this point, his redemption was all over.

The other Great Ancestors also completed the exchange one after another, and they were all satisfied.

"You can leave!"

The phantom of Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor waved his hand, and Ye Tian and the other Great Ancestors were teleported away.

......

Genki Territory.

Ye Tian is back, and the position where he came is still the same as the place he left from.

"I'm back, I've made a lot of money this time!"

Ye Tian was quite excited.

Immediately, he began to retreat, preparing to use this opportunity to improve his strength.

He didn't plan to go to the Glazed Light Sea first, he was going to refine the Taishang Divine Blood first, and after breaking the realm of Taihao's immeasurable body, he would decide on the next step.
